name: OmniVoice (local TTS)
description: On-device TTS via llama-omnivoice-server. No API key, no network calls at runtime. Auto-downloads the Q4_K_M GGUF model the first time you synthesize.
long_description: Runs the OmniVoice GGUF model (Q4_K_M for the tightest memory footprint while you're streaming) under Weclank's own ~/.weclank/local-inference tree. First call downloads ~660MB of model weights from huggingface.co/Serveurperso/OmniVoice-GGUF; the llama-omnivoice-server binary is built locally via `bun run build:omnivoice` (clones ServeurpersoCom/omnivoice.cpp and cmake-builds with Metal/CUDA/CPU auto-detection). Subsequent calls are a sub-second LM forward pass on the GPU backend plus codec decode.
